case_title: FILLMORE PROPERTIES, L.L.C. VS. ANTHONY POLSTON et al

docket_entries.description: WRIT OF POSSESSION FOR REAL PROPERTY TO SAN FRANCISCO CO. FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE PROPERTIES, L.L.C. AS TO DEFENDANT POLSTON, ANTHONY
WRIT OF POSSESSION TO SAN FRANCISCO RETURNED & FILED FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE PROPERTIES, L.L.C.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT POLSTON, ANTHONY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1420 TURK STREET, APARTMENT #PH1H, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94115, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE PROPERTIES, L.L.C. AS TO DEFENDANT POLSTON, ANTHONY DOES I THROUGH V, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE PROPERTIES, L.L.C. SERVED OCT-10-2001, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT POLSTON, ANTHONY
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT POLSTON, ANTHONY
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE RE: DAILY RENTAL $64.33 FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE PROPERTIES, L.L.C.
DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE PROPERTIES, L.L.C.
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT IN FULL FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE PROPERTIES, L.L.C. AS TO DEFENDANT POLSTON, ANTHONY DOES I THROUGH V, INCLUSIVE
